message:
fix: propagate file read errors in compatibility scanner for fail-closed behavior

Change scan_files() and scan_file() to return Result instead of
silently ignoring unreadable source files. Previously, files that
could not be read via fs::read_to_string were silently skipped,
which could cause the compatibility scanner to report clean results
for extensions with partially inaccessible sources.

scan_path() now propagates errors from scan_files(), and scan_file()
returns a structured Error::extension with the file path included.

Add test: compatibility_scanner_scan_path_fails_on_unreadable_file
verifies that a permission-denied file causes scan failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
